title: A Walk by the Sea
content: Every evening during his vacation, Noah enjoyed taking a walk along the seaside promenade. The path followed the coastline and offered beautiful views of the ocean. People rode bicycles, walked dogs, and sat on benches watching the waves. Small cafés and restaurants lined the street, creating a lively atmosphere. Noah often stopped to listen to street musicians or watch boats in the distance. The combination of fresh air, sea views, and relaxed surroundings made these walks one of his favorite daily activities.
